name: Perseus Mining Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.3100, stop A$4.3857, target A$6.2563 (1.02:1) — then trail it.
